home.deleteProductConfirmation: Delete {name}? This product will be hidden from the overview.
home.emptyDescription: Create a product to start organizing its pieces, materials, and cut maps.
home.loadErrorDescription: Check DATABASE_URL, apply the Prisma migration, and reload this page.
home.subtitle: Organize product patterns, photos, materials, and production files from one place.
home.title: Bomify

productCreate.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional production notes, silhouette, client, or product family.
productCreate.photoHelp: Photos are stored in MinIO/S3, never in the local filesystem.
productCreate.subtitle: Create the product shell first. Pieces, materials, and cut maps will attach to it later.
productCreate.title: Add product

productWorkspace.canvasEmptyDescription: This area will host the material maps, piece previews, and production canvas.
productWorkspace.combinationDeleteDescription: This hides the combination from the workspace without deleting its history.
productWorkspace.combinationEmptyDescription: Create the first material/color version for this product.
productWorkspace.combinationMaterialEmptyDescription: Attach product materials first, then assign them to combination roles.
productWorkspace.combinationsPanelDescription: Manage material choices that vary between product versions.
productWorkspace.materialCatalogEmptyDescription: No catalog materials match this search. Create one from this dialog for now.
productWorkspace.materialDeleteDescription: This removes the material from this product only. The global material remains available.
productWorkspace.materialEmptyDescription: Attach a global material to use it in cut maps for this product.
productWorkspace.materialsPanelDescription: Review roll widths, colors, and material families for this product.
productWorkspace.piecesPanelDescription: Prepare pattern pieces, quantities, dimensions, and future imports.
productWorkspace.pieceCombinationScopeEmptyDescription: Assign material roles to this combination before adding piece quantities.
productWorkspace.pieceDeleteDescription: This hides the piece from the workspace without deleting the stored production history.
productWorkspace.pieceDxfDropHint: Drag a DXF here or choose one from your computer.
productWorkspace.pieceEmptyDescription: Upload the first DXF pattern piece to start building material requirements.
productWorkspace.pieceGlobalScopeEmptyDescription: Attach product materials before adding global requirements.
productWorkspace.productPanelDescription: Keep the product reference, photo, and production notes close to the canvas.
productWorkspace.stickersPanelDescription: Preview printable piece labels before generating sticker sheets.
productWorkspace.uploadsPanelDescription: Stage PDFs, DXFs, photos, and production files for this product.
